name: PromptInput
description: Multiline AI prompt textarea with submit + keyboard shortcuts.

api.name: PromptInput
api.description: Multiline AI prompt textarea with submit + keyboard shortcuts.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<PromptInput @bind-Value="_prompt" OnSend="@HandleSend" Placeholder="Ask anything…" />

@code {
    private string? _prompt;
    private void HandleSend(string text) { /* call AI API */ }
}

examples.title: Loading State
examples.code:
<PromptInput @bind-Value="_prompt" IsLoading="@_isLoading" OnSend="@HandleSend" />

@code {
    private string? _prompt;
    private bool _isLoading;

    private async Task HandleSend(string text)
    {
        _isLoading = true;
        await CallAiApi(text);
        _isLoading = false;
    }
}

examples.title: With Leading and Trailing Content
examples.code: Shift+Enter for newline

mdSummary:
# PromptInput

Multiline AI prompt textarea with submit + keyboard shortcuts.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** AI
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/prompt-input

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PromptInput | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| PromptInput | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| PromptInput | Placeholder | `string` | `"Ask anything…"` |  |
| PromptInput | MaxHeight | `int` | `240` |  |
| PromptInput | MinHeight | `int` | `56` |  |
| PromptInput | IsLoading | `bool` | `` |  |
| PromptInput | OnSend | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| PromptInput | DisableSendOnEmpty | `bool` | `true` |  |
| PromptInput | LeadingContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| PromptInput | TrailingContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| PromptInput | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| PromptInput | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `LeadingContent` (PromptInput) — RenderFragment slot
- `TrailingContent` (PromptInput) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)
- `OnSend` (`EventCallback<string>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` (Services)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleKeyDown handles Enter in PromptInput.razor

## Example
```razor
<PromptInput />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/PromptInput/PromptInput.razor`
